svg.title: Product quantization, query time
svg.desc: The query is split into subvectors q1 and q2. Each subvector's distance to every centroid of its codebook is precomputed, filling two lookup table rows. The stored code of x from index time selects one entry per row, and the sum of the selected entries gives the approximate squared distance between q and x.
svg.text: table entries selected by x's code [1, 1]
table cells: distance from qj to each centroid of codebook j
